claim_boundary: This extension tests whether MOSAIC's reported retention advantage survives a matched confidence-region grid and a structure-aware Holm LTT baseline on untouched paired synthetic tables. It does not turn the FARE-style adaptation into an official FARE end-to-end experiment.
fare_scope: The deterministic row tests FARE's restricted finite-encoder principle in this token/shift setting. It is not the official FARE fair-tree training pipeline, whose raw-input demographic-parity setting is not commensurate with this conditional shift witness.

methods.fare_style_deterministic: A matched restricted finite-encoder adaptation using all deterministic 3-to-2 maps and the same shift-aware certificate.
methods.holm_ltt_grid: Candidate-level composite Hoeffding p-values for the unsafe union null, followed by Holm step-down control across all 500 pairs.
methods.mosaic_continuum: The globally optimized stochastic continuum under one pre-channel multinomial confidence event.
methods.table_region_grid: The same simultaneous confidence event and structured-shift certificate, restricted to the fixed 500 channel-decoder pairs.

pass_conditions.comparison_gate: None. Report every paired rate and interval regardless of ordering.

seed_exclusion: All prior synthetic pilot, confirmation, transform-exact, and theory-alignment seeds are excluded.
stopping_rule: Run all 2,000 tables and all four methods. No seed replacement, candidate change, threshold change, or selective omission.
